name: Quick Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except vanilla and pecans in a large saucepan.
2. Boil the mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it reaches 240°F (115°C) on a candy thermometer.
3. Remove from heat and let cool for 2 minutes.
4. Add pecans and vanilla extract, then stir until well combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
6. Allow to cool completely before serving.
